entries.name: Backend
entries.explanation: The Backend team handles api, services, core logic, database integrations.

entries.name: Frontend
entries.explanation: The Frontend team handles ui, components, pwa, accessibility, react, next.js.

entries.name: Data
entries.explanation: The Data team handles database models, migrations, query optimisation, prisma.

entries.name: Infrastructure
entries.explanation: The Infrastructure team handles iac, cloud resources, terraform, bicep, azure.

entries.name: DevOps
entries.explanation: The DevOps team handles ci/cd, pipelines, containers, docker, deployment automation.

entries.name: Testing
entries.explanation: The Testing team handles unit tests, integration tests, e2e tests, coverage, vitest, playwright.

entries.name: Security
entries.explanation: The Security team handles auth, compliance, audit, secrets management, rbac.

entries.name: Documentation
entries.explanation: The Documentation team handles technical documentation, adrs, guides, changelogs, api docs.

entries.name: Product
entries.explanation: The Product team handles product requirements, features, roadmap, prds, user stories.

entries.name: Quality
entries.explanation: The Quality team handles code review, refactoring, bug triage, technical debt.

entries.name: TeamForge
entries.explanation: The TeamForge team handles agent team spec creation, validation, retort sync, agentkit configuration.

entries.name: Strategic Ops
entries.explanation: The Strategic Ops team handles cross-project coordination, planning, architectural strategy, roadmap alignment.

entries.name: Cost Ops
entries.explanation: The Cost Ops team handles ai cost reduction, llm spend tracking, vendor optimisation, token budgets.
